onboardingEmptyState.description: {brandName} turns your spec into working software — built and reviewed live on a map. Vivi sets up your project to begin.

viviOnboarding.heading: Start a project
viviOnboarding.description: {brandName} develops one project from its canonical spec. Choose how to begin — Vivi takes it from there.
viviOnboarding.importPickTargetHint: Docs are imported into a project's .vivicy/ — choose the folder they belong to first.

open.title: Open an existing project
open.description: Point {brandName} at a repository already on disk.

scaffold.title: Start a new project
scaffold.description: Name it and {brandName} scaffolds a lean method skeleton.

import.title: Import documents
import.description: Bring spec docs you already have — verified before anything is placed.

openProjectDialog.title: Open project
openProjectDialog.description: Choose the local repository {brandName} should develop. Navigate to a folder and select it, or paste an absolute path.

toast.selectedNoSpec: {root} (no docs/ — extract has no spec to read yet)

toast.successDescription: {root} — write your canonical docs, then extract.

importDocsDialog.title: Import your docs
importDocsDialog.description: Drop files, a folder, or a .zip. {brandName} checks the corpus for drift or contradictions before placing anything — nothing lands in .vivicy/ until the check is green.

dropzone.prompt: Drag files, a folder, or a .zip here

staged.count: Staged {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}

verified.collisionsIntro: Apply refused — these destinations already exist and were not touched:

placed.count: Placed {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}

toast.folderReadErrorTitle: Could not read the dropped folder
toast.folderReadErrorDescription: This browser can't read folder contents from a drop. Use “Choose folder” instead.
